MINI MINUTES: JPT Paul Renne; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Defendant Judith Birnbaum is not present.

Plaintiff's counsel, Mr. Zanghi, reports that case needs settlement protective date to gather signatures in the agreement. Jury Trial is continued to January 21, 2014 at 9:00am in Dept. 501 for settlement protective date. Mr. Zanghi will give notice to the Defendant. (501/JPT)
